fixesApplied: Feature files: removed incorrect 'install' subcommand prefix, added correct --mcp flag for MCP scenarios
Feature files: replaced jq assertions with grep (jq not available in environment)
Fixture: manifest.json name field changed from 'test-pack' to 'test/test-pack' (namespace/pack-name format required)
Fixture: manifest.json asset source paths changed from manifest-relative (../...) to CWD-relative (./fixtures/...)
notes: case-hcd001: On Windows, AGENT_GET_HOME only redirects ~/Library paths; %APPDATA% path is used for Claude Desktop. Install functionally correct, isolation only works on macOS.
